code: import api,{firstSuccess}from'./api';export const cartService={createCart:async cart=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.post('/carts',cart),()=>api.post('/api/carts',cart)])).data,getAllCarts:async()=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get('/carts'),()=>api.get('/api/carts')])).data,getCartById:async id=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/carts/".concat(id)),()=>api.get("/api/carts/".concat(id))])).data,getCartByUserId:async userId=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.get("/carts/user/".concat(userId)),()=>api.get("/api/carts/user/".concat(userId)),()=>api.get("/api/carts/user-id/".concat(userId))])).data,updateCart:async(id,cart)=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.put("/carts/".concat(id),cart),()=>api.put("/api/carts/".concat(id),cart)])).data,deleteCart:async id=>(await firstSuccess([()=>api.delete("/carts/".concat(id)),()=>api.delete("/api/carts/".concat(id))])).data};
